text.title: Fitness Function Wiring Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Fitness Function Wiring output via JSON Schema (draft-07). Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

example.note: artefact_id too short; owner is plural pronoun ('team'); missing rationale, version, last_reviewed; inputs_used empty.

list.item: rationale without any input reference by name
inputs_used is empty AND decision is not "no-op"
duplicate artefact_id within the same store
